jobDescriptions.en-US: Data-Driven Content Marketing: We are a big data company! So the way we do content is a bit different than traditional content marketing. We will be publishing data-driven reports, whitepapers, and sometimes industry researches. You will learn how to tell stories with data.

jobDescriptions.en-US: 2C & 2B Experience: We own both consumer-facing and business-oriented services, so for both products, we need different marketing strategies. You will need to launch and execute various marketing campaigns/ads strategies to promote both products.
